title.en: Waking from deep sleep & pulling frames back: the WUR-Discovery and CancelTX primitives
title.zh: 从深度休眠中发现网络与撤回待发帧：WUR 发现与 CancelTX 原语

blocks.en: This lesson surveys two small, very different control knobs that the management entity (SME) reaches for through the MLME-SAP. One is about waking up cheaply; the other is about throwing away work you no longer want done. They share a flavour: each is a request the SME hands to the MAC, paired with a confirm that tells the SME how it went. WUR-Discovery answers "which networks are out there?" while the main radio sleeps. CancelTX answers "never mind — don't send that."
blocks.zh: 本课带你纵览两个小巧却风格迥异的控制旋钮，它们都是管理实体（SME）通过 MLME-SAP 触达的。一个关乎“如何省电地醒来”，另一个关乎“扔掉不再想做的活”。它们有共同的味道：每个都是 SME 交给 MAC 的一条 request，再配上一条 confirm 告诉 SME 结果如何。WUR 发现回答的是“在主收发机睡着时，外面有哪些网络？”；CancelTX 回答的则是“算了——别发那个了。”

blocks.en: First, the battery story. A Wake-Up Radio (WUR) non-AP STA keeps its power-hungry main radio asleep and listens only on a tiny, ultra-low-power companion radio. But how does such a STA learn which BSSs it could join without firing up the main radio to scan? That is exactly what the WUR discovery procedure is for: the STA listens on a short list of channels for WUR Discovery frames that APs broadcast, and reports back which APs it heard. It is the WUR-era analog of classic scanning — but done on the cheap companion radio.
blocks.zh: 先讲省电这条线。带唤醒收发机（WUR）的非 AP 站点，会让耗电的主收发机保持休眠，仅靠一个极低功耗的微型伴随收发机来侦听。可这样的站点，怎么在不启动主收发机扫描的情况下，得知自己能加入哪些 BSS 呢？这正是 WUR 发现流程要解决的：站点在一小串信道上侦听 AP 广播的 WUR Discovery 帧，并把听到的 AP 报告回来。它就是 WUR 时代的“经典扫描”等价物——只不过是在那个廉价的伴随收发机上完成的。

blocks.en: Notice the asymmetry of the two confirms. MLME-WURDISCOVERY.confirm carries a rich payload — a set of discovered-BSS descriptions, each with the AP's compressed identity, operating channel and RSSI. MLME-CANCELTX.confirm, by contrast, has no parameters at all: its only job is to say "done, you may tell whoever asked."
blocks.zh: 留意这两个 confirm 的不对称。MLME-WURDISCOVERY.confirm 携带了丰富的内容——一组“已发现 BSS”的描述，每条都带有该 AP 的压缩身份、工作信道与 RSSI。相比之下，MLME-CANCELTX.confirm 完全没有参数：它唯一的任务就是说一句“完成了，你可以去通知发起请求的那一方。”

blocks.en:
mindmap
  root((MLME-SAP knobs))
    WUR Discovery
      .request
        "start WUR scan on a channel list"
        "dwell MinChannelTime..MaxChannelTime"
      .confirm
        "report set of discovered BSSs"
        "per-AP: ID, channel, RSSI"
    CancelTX
      .request
        "eject queued MSDUs of an Access Category"
      .confirm
        "no params — just signals completion"
blocks.zh:
mindmap
  root((MLME-SAP 控制旋钮))
    WUR 发现
      .request
        "在信道列表上启动 WUR 扫描"
        "驻留 MinChannelTime..MaxChannelTime"
      .confirm
        "上报已发现的一组 BSS"
        "每个 AP：ID、信道、RSSI"
    CancelTX
      .request
        "清空某访问类别的待发 MSDU"
      .confirm
        "无参数——仅表示完成"

blocks.en: Walking the primitives one line each. MLME-WURDISCOVERY.request is what the SME of a WUR non-AP STA fires to start scanning: it names a WURDiscoveryChannelList, a Min/MaxChannelTime dwell window per channel, and optionally a Transmitter ID plus a CompressedBSSID_MSB and Compressed SSID to look for a specific AP — on air, this means "go listen on these channels for WUR Discovery frames." MLME-WURDISCOVERY.confirm is the MLME reporting back: it returns a BSSDescriptionFromWDSet (zero or more discovered WUR APs, each with identity, operating channel and RSSI) so the SME learns its surroundings.
blocks.zh: 逐条过一遍这些原语，每个一句话。MLME-WURDISCOVERY.request 是 WUR 非 AP 站点的 SME 用来启动扫描的：它给出一个 WURDiscoveryChannelList、每信道的 Min/MaxChannelTime 驻留时间窗，并可选地给出 Transmitter ID 以及 CompressedBSSID_MSB 与 Compressed SSID 以查找某个特定 AP——在空口上，这意味着“去这些信道上侦听 WUR Discovery 帧”。MLME-WURDISCOVERY.confirm 则是 MLME 的回报：它返回一个 BSSDescriptionFromWDSet（零个或多个被发现的 WUR AP，每个都带有身份、工作信道与 RSSI），让 SME 了解自己的周边环境。

blocks.en: Now the queue-eject knob. MLME-CANCELTX.request is generated by the SME of an OCB STA when a higher-layer entity (the standard cites the IEEE 1609 family used in vehicular networks) decides some already-queued MSDUs should not go out — e.g. low-latency data that has gone stale. It carries one parameter, AccessCategoryIndex (0–3 selects one access category, 4 means all), and on receipt the MAC removes all queued MSDUs of that category from the transmit queue before they ever reach the medium. MLME-CANCELTX.confirm then reports that the removal is complete, so the SME can in turn notify the higher-layer entity that asked for it.
blocks.zh: 再看“队列弹射”这个旋钮。MLME-CANCELTX.request 由 OCB 站点的 SME 生成，触发时机是某个高层实体（标准引用了用于车联网的 IEEE 1609 系列）判定某些已经排队的 MSDU 不应再发出——例如已经过时的低时延数据。它携带一个参数 AccessCategoryIndex（0–3 选择某一个访问类别，4 表示全部），MAC 收到后会在这些 MSDU 触及无线介质之前，把该类别下所有排队的 MSDU 从发送队列中移除。随后 MLME-CANCELTX.confirm 报告移除完成，于是 SME 便可反过来通知当初提出请求的那个高层实体。

blocks.en: Map both families back to the air. WUR-Discovery = listen/scan for WUR-advertising APs on the cheap companion radio (no frame you send, just frames you hear and report). CancelTX = suppress frames before they ever hit the medium (no new air activity at all — the win is the transmissions that now never happen).
blocks.zh: 把这两族都对应回空口。WUR 发现 = 在廉价的伴随收发机上侦听/扫描那些在广播 WUR 通告的 AP（你不发送任何帧，只是听到并上报）。CancelTX = 在帧触及介质之前就把它压下（根本没有新的空口活动——其收益恰恰是那些如今再也不会发生的发送）。

summary.en: Exact parameters and who generates what
summary.zh: 精确的参数与“谁生成什么”

blocks.en: Per clause 6.5.25, the WUR discovery primitives support the procedure described in 29.12. MLME-WURDISCOVERY.request (6.5.25.2) is generated by the SME for a WUR non-AP STA to determine if there are other BSSs it can join, and its receipt initiates the WUR discovery procedure; its parameters are WURDiscoveryChannelList (operating class + channel info per 9.4.1.22), MinChannelTime, MaxChannelTime (>= MinChannelTime, in TU), and the optional Transmitter ID, CompressedBSSID_MSB and Compressed SSID. MLME-WURDISCOVERY.confirm (6.5.25.3) is generated by the MLME after the request to report the operating environment; it returns a BSSDescriptionFromWDSet of zero or more BSSDescriptionFromWDs (each: Transmitter ID, CompressedBSSID_MSB, Compressed SSID, Operating Channel, RSSI) plus a ResultCode. Per clause 6.5.26, MLME-CANCELTX.request (6.5.26.2) is generated by the SME of an OCB STA carrying an AccessCategoryIndex (0–4); its receipt causes the MAC to remove all queued MSDUs of that access category from the transmit queue. MLME-CANCELTX.confirm (6.5.26.3) has no parameters and is generated by the MLME to inform the SME the cancellation completed, so the SME can inform the requesting higher-layer entity.
blocks.zh: 依据 6.5.25 节，WUR 发现原语支持 29.12 中描述的流程。MLME-WURDISCOVERY.request（6.5.25.2）由 SME 为某个 WUR 非 AP 站点生成，用以判断是否有其他可加入的 BSS，其被接收即启动 WUR 发现流程；参数为 WURDiscoveryChannelList（按 9.4.1.22 的操作类与信道信息）、MinChannelTime、MaxChannelTime（>= MinChannelTime，单位 TU），以及可选的 Transmitter ID、CompressedBSSID_MSB 与 Compressed SSID。MLME-WURDISCOVERY.confirm（6.5.25.3）由 MLME 在该 request 之后生成以报告运行环境；它返回一个 BSSDescriptionFromWDSet，含零个或多个 BSSDescriptionFromWD（每个包含：Transmitter ID、CompressedBSSID_MSB、Compressed SSID、Operating Channel、RSSI），外加一个 ResultCode。依据 6.5.26 节，MLME-CANCELTX.request（6.5.26.2）由 OCB 站点的 SME 生成，携带 AccessCategoryIndex（0–4）；其被接收会使 MAC 从发送队列中移除该访问类别下所有排队的 MSDU。MLME-CANCELTX.confirm（6.5.26.3）无参数，由 MLME 生成以告知 SME 取消已完成，从而 SME 可通知发起请求的高层实体。

cites.note: 6.5.25.2-6.5.25.3 MLME-WURDISCOVERY.request/.confirm — WUR scan on a channel list; BSSDescriptionFromWDSet (ID, channel, RSSI); procedure in 29.12
6.5.26.2-6.5.26.3 MLME-CANCELTX.request/.confirm — OCB STA SME cancels queued MSDUs by AccessCategoryIndex (0-4); confirm has no parameters
